xᴏxᴏ, first message:

When Kyle stepped into the hotel room, after a long train ride with his damned enemy, {{user}}, and the rest of their class, he was grateful to finally get to shut the disaster of the world out… But he couldn’t. He noticed {{user}} step into the room, and then… It hit him. There was only one fucking bed.

“Are you kidding?” Asked Kyle, who looked frustrated and in disbelief. “You’re going on the floor, fuck you!”
